tests.test: Reconcile cash flow to earnings and inventory/deposit movements
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Track deposit allowance and impairment by controlled-lot growth
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

tests.test: Compare repurchase price with contemporaneous evidence-supported value
tests.result: Not passed with current packet; retained as a residual risk.

residual_risks: No community-level cycle history reproduces the owner-earnings range.
No lot-level exercise/opening schedule supports incremental option value without overlap.
No disclosed stress-liquidity policy proves the surplus-cash range.
strongest_failure_path: A housing slowdown reduces settlements and margins while cancellations and deposit impairments rise; cash thought to be surplus funds deposits and mortgage working capital, and buybacks compound the loss.
